_comment: Browser-demo fixture for Step 9 synthesized music bed (decision #34). Load with ?fixture=12-music-bed-mood-driven&music_bed=auto to force behavior.narration_music_bed='auto' (the dev override hook). The synthesized provider reads experience.mood_tags and parameterizes the drone: 'intimate' here gets a soft warm A2+P5 bed (root 110Hz, perfect-fifth above, low-pass at 600Hz, slow 0.1Hz LFO). Try swapping mood_tags to 'energetic' (165Hz + faster LFO), 'melancholy' (minor third), or 'triumphant' (bright 1500Hz filter) to hear the mapping table direct the bed differently. The bed plays under the audio item with a 1.5s fade-in to TARGET_GAIN=0.03 — low enough not to compete with the song. On mobile, the music bed is a no-op (iOS coexistence trap per IMPLEMENTATION-GUIDE §3.3) — the audio item still plays, just without the bed underneath.
name: Demo — Mood-Driven Music Bed
description: Synthesized music bed under an audio item, parameterized by experience mood_tags.

items.content_title: Bed Demo — swap ?mood_tags via fixture edit
